title: MikroTik RouterBOARD RBLHGG-5acD-XL4pack, LHG XL 5 ac 4pack, L3
description: The Light Head Grid (LHG XL 5 ac) is a compact and light wireless device with an integrated 27 dBi grid antenna at a revolutionary price. It is perfect for point to point links or for use as a CPE at longer distances . Compared with the standard version, antenna gain is 2,5dBi higher than standard version. The grid design ensures protection against wind , and the fact that the antenna element is built into the wireless unit means no loss on cables The device comes disassembled for compact shipping , but is very easy to assemble it. Antenna includes a simple to use grounding attachment point. The package also contains a small adapter for tilting the antenna five degrees from the original position (4 Device (4) Power adapter 24V/0.38A (4) Gigabit PoE injector (8) metal rings (4) K-LHG kit for antenna tilt
